title: Between the Shadows GM-Approval R.C.C.s (pp. 63–76) — Pass A then Pass B
notes: Astral Plane R.C.C.s for races/nightbane/gm_approval.json. Each batch: race row + paired shadow O.C.C. in occs/nightbane/between_the_shadows.json. XP: Millek → between_shadows_millek_astral_mage; Necrophim → between_shadows_necrophim; Tarantuloid warrior/craftsman → nightbane_core_snakebird_mystic; Tarantuloid sorcerer-priest → nightbane_core_nightbane_guardian (specializations on occ_tarantuloid_rcc, ADA Field Agent pattern). Mountebank → npc pool (separate brief). Out of scope: Torturian (never PC), Shadow Mantis (monster NPC).
